CREATE TABLE airline_data (AirlineID Int32, FlightCount Int32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY AirlineID;
SELECT topK(2)(AirlineID) AS frequent_airlines FROM airline_data;
SELECT topK(5, 4)(AirlineID) AS frequent_airlines FROM airline_data;
SELECT topK(10, 5, 'counts')(AirlineID) AS frequent_airlines, COUNT(*) FROM airline_data GROUP BY AirlineID;
SELECT airline_id, topK(3)(FlightCount) AS top_flight_counts FROM (SELECT AirlineID as airline_id, FlightCount FROM airline_data) GROUP BY airline_id;
CREATE TABLE flight_data (AirlineID Int32, DepartureTime DateTime, FlightDuration Int32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY DepartureTime;
SELECT AirlineID, topK(2)(FlightDuration) AS top_durations FROM flight_data GROUP BY AirlineID;
SELECT AirlineID, COUNT(*) AS flight_count FROM flight_data GROUP BY AirlineID HAVING flight_count > 1;
SELECT AirlineID, topK(3, 2, 'counts')(FlightDuration) AS frequent_durations FROM flight_data WHERE AirlineID IN (SELECT AirlineID FROM airline_data WHERE FlightCount > 0) GROUP BY AirlineID;
